description: Style Note Don that sporty look with ease with this red polo t-shirt from the arrow sport collection. The soft fabric is designed for style, this tee offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sports shoes. Product DetailsRed polo t-shirt, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with tipped cuffs, half buttoned placket, appliqué on the left chest and a vented hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle   Do not bleach or wring Low tumble dry Use medium heat steam iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulder 18”) is wearing a size M
